title: MineableBedrock
body:
# MineableBedrock
## Summary
A server side fabric mod that makes bedrock harvestable with a silk touch diamond pickaxe or better. 
## Features
- Build your house out of bedrock!
- Jump into the void!
- Breach the nether roof!
- Realize your bedrock breaking dreams!
## Requirements
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
